creator: Merlin
flavor: In the devastating wake of the Avengers' disbandment, a time-traveling teenager desperately seeking to rewrite his dark destiny activates a hidden protocol, uniting a new generation of legacy heroes to stop a temporal conqueror.
name: The Failsafe Awakening
text: Action: Discard an Honorary Avenger upgrade from your hand → Draw 1 card and flip this card.

creator: Merlin
flavor: Having proven their courage through countless reality-bending crises and cosmic wars, the young heroes finally step out of their mentors' shadows, officially accepting their rightful places as equals on the main Avengers roster.
name: Passing the Torch
text: Each [[Young Avenger]] hero gain the [[Avenger]] Trait. Response: After a player plays a [[young avenger]] ally, that player search their deck and discard pile for an Honorary Avenger upgrade and attach it to that ally.
